description: A perfect tribute to ace Basketball player Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Killer Lo shoe from puma makes for a fabulous casual wear when not playing on the court.UpperFabric upper with durable PU toe box and formstripe for absolute comfort and durabilityLace up system for a snug, customized FitPU foxing for durabilityMidsoleLightweight EVA midsole for comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with ergonomic grooves for absolute grip and traction
